name: Pecan Cheddar Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the butter and cheese.
2. Combine flour, paprika, and salt; add to the creamed mixture.
3. Shape dough into 1-inch balls.
4. Place the balls 2 inches apart on an un-greased baking sheet.
5. Top each ball with a pecan.
6. Press down to flatten.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and place on a wire rack to cool.
Yield: about 2 dozen.
